zh.Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆
zh.Dedham, Colchester Borough, Essex, Engla: 英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Pellett於1548年7月28日出生在英國素可斯易寧時，她的父親William Pellett37歲，母親Eleanor Clere42歲。她於1569年4月25日與Edmund Sherman在英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1584年6月8日之前在英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆，埋葬在英國艾可迪德哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Pellett于1548年7月28日出生在英国素可斯易寧时，她的父亲William Pellett37岁，母亲Eleanor Clere42岁。她于1569年4月25日与Edmund Sherman在英国英格兰艾可迪德哈姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1584年6月8日之前在英国英格兰艾可迪德哈姆，埋葬在英国艾可迪德哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Pellett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): either from a pet form of the personal name Pell , or a metonymic occupational name for a furrier, from Old French pellet ‘fur’, a diminutive of pel ‘skin’. Compare Pelletier .

variants.name: Pell
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Pell, apet form of Peter .
English: metonymic occupational name fora dealer in furs, from Middle English, Old French pel‘skin’.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Pellett was born on 28 July 1548, in Steyning, Sussex, England, her father, William Pellett, was 37 and her mother, Eleanor Clere, was 42. She married Edmund Sherman on 25 April 1569, in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 8 June 1584, in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Dedham, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Pellett est née le 28 juillet 1548, à Steyning, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William Pellett, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Clere, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund Sherman le 25 avril 1569, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 8 juin 1584, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Pellett am 28. Juli 1548 in Steyning, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Pellett 37 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Clere 42. Sie hat am 25. April 1569 in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom Edmund Sherman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 8. Juni 1584 in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Dedham, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Pellett è nata il il 28 luglio 1548 nel Steyning, Sussex, England, sua padre, William Pellett, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Clere, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Edmund Sherman il 25 aprile 1569, nel Dedham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 8 giugno 1584, nel Dedham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Dedham, Essex, England.

ja.Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスエセックスデドハム
ja.Dedham, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスデドハム
ja.Steyning, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスステイニング
ja.Dedham, Colchester Borough, Essex, Engla: イギリスイギリスエセックスデドハム
ja.lifeSummary: Anne Pellettが1548年7月28日にイギリススセックスステイニングで生まれた時，父William Pellettは37歳，母Eleanor Clereは42歳であった。1569年4月25日にイギリスイギリスエセックスデドハムでEdmund Shermanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1584年6月8日以前にイギリスイギリスエセックスデドハムで死去し，イギリスエセックスデドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Pellett(이)가 1548년 7월 28일 영국 수세스 스테이닝에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Pellett(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Clere(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1569년 4월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 데드함에서 Edmund Sherman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1584년 6월 8일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 데드함에서 사망했으며 영국 에세스 데드함에 묻혔다.

pt.28 July 1548–Bef 8 June 1584: 28 de julho de 1548–antes 8 de junho de 1584
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Pellett nasceu em 28 de julho de 1548, em Steyning, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Pellett, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Clere, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmund Sherman em 25 de abril de 1569, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 8 de junho de 1584, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Pellett родилась 28 июля 1548 г. в местности стининг, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени William Pellett было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Clere, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Sherman 25 апреля 1569 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 8 июнь 1584 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия.

es.28 July 1548–Bef 8 June 1584: 28 de julio de 1548–antes de 8 de junio de 1584
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Pellett nació el 28 de julio de 1548, en Steyning, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, William Pellett, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Eleanor Clere, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Edmund Sherman el 25 de abril de 1569, en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 8 de junio de 1584, en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra.
